title: ev_breakeven_v1 pre-registered EV threshold + proposal-time feature-existence gate
source: quant-phd-advisor verdict 2026-06-11 (Elkan 2001 cost-ratio theorem; AFML ch.3/10)
why: Fixed 0.50 meta threshold is payoff-blind: with tp=3/sl=1 barriers the EV breakeven is ~0.33, so honest calibrated probabilities in [0.25,0.48] containing positive-EV trades were discarded wholesale (4/4 NO_FIRE audits 2026-06-11).

history.reason: ev_breakeven_v1 + feature-existence gate implemented and tested (32 new tests, suite 1472). Hypothesizer v2 constraints added. Committed with this change.
